hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$f" in *.env.example|*.env.sample|*.env.template|*.env.dist) exit 0;; *.env|*.env.*|*.pem|*.key|*.p8|*.cert|*.crt|*.p12|*.pfx|*/credentials|*/credentials.json|*/.netrc) echo "🚫 Blocked write to secret/credential file: $f" >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; if grep -q '@ts-ignore' "$f" 2>/dev/null; then echo "🚫 $f uses @ts-ignore — the repo bans it. Use one documented // @ts-expect-error only for the known supabase-js quirk." >&2; exit 2; fi; case "$f" in *.test.ts|*.test.tsx) if grep -q 'expect(<' "$f" 2>/dev/null; then echo "🚫 $f looks like a hollow test (expect(<JSX/>) is always truthy). render() and assert real content — see .claude/rules/testing.md." >&2; exit 2; fi;; esac; exit 0

root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$root" || exit 0; git status --porcelain -- '*.ts' '*.tsx' 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || exit 0; out=$(npx tsc --noEmit --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .tsbuildinfo 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "🚫 Typecheck failed — fix before finishing:" >&2; echo "$out" | tail -15 >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
